# loopclub

> loopclub is the online platform for writing music with other musicians in real time — an on-chain drum machine built on MegaETH.

loopclub lets musicians, producers, and songwriters write and produce music together online in real time. Start a session in your browser, invite collaborators with a link, and build loops together cell by cell on a shared step sequencer. Every beat you add is provably yours on-chain. There's nothing to download or install, and opening a session to start building is free.

## Key Topics
- Real-time collaborative music writing online
- Writing and producing music with other musicians remotely
- Free, in-browser loop-based beat making
- Shared step-sequencer sessions you can invite anyone into
- On-chain ownership of the beats you create (MegaETH)

## Pages
- [Home](https://loopclub.xyz/): What loopclub is, how it works, and FAQ for writing music with others online.
- [App](https://app.loopclub.xyz/): Launch loopclub and start or join a collaborative music session.
